blogs.name: x402 Report
blogs.title: x402 v2 Release: Enhancing AI Payments on Injective and Solana Blockchains
blogs.description: Developers have released a full working implementation of x402 version 2, addressing key product frictions encountered in real-world applications. This update enables more flexible payment handling beyond single-call, exact-amount transactions, building on six months of production use. The implementation provides a complete reference for integrating the updated standard. x402 v2 Is Live , And It […]
